approvedExceptions.allowedImplementation: Narrow custom provider-branded CTA treatment only where provider brand policy requires it.
mustNotDo: Introduce a parallel local design system
Bypass GDS tokens, typography, spacing, or focus semantics
Create generic non-provider custom button variants outside the exception scope
approvedExceptions.exitCondition: Replace with canonical provider-branded identity controls from published GDS package contracts.
approvedExceptions.reason: Google and Facebook provider branding rules still require narrow custom presentation during the current migration phase.

approvedExceptions.allowedImplementation: Use local docs-shell wrapper only for docs navigation/framing while pages consume GDS primitives directly where available.
mustNotDo: Add new non-GDS visual primitives for docs shells or layouts
Expand exception scope beyond docs routes
approvedExceptions.exitCondition: Delete DocsLayout and migrate all docs routes to direct canonical package-level shell composition.
approvedExceptions.reason: The docs area still carries a local docs-site shell wrapper and two targeted lint waivers on long-form prose-heavy docs pages.
